hypothesis: The exact init-clean v99 Board A bitstream reproduces the same DDR3 byte/phase behavior on Board B.

controlled_input.bitstream_origin: v99 Board A init-clean byte-phase association matrix

interpretation.reason: Board B did not reach FPGA DONE/configured state with the exact v99 Board A bitstream, although JTAG detects the expected xc7k480t device.

decision.next_gate: resolve Board B configuration/comparability before programming v106/v107 or interpreting DDR3 behavior
decision.do_not_run_next: v106/v107 DDR probes on Board B while exact v99 reports DONE=0
